docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF FABIOLA BENAVIDES BANDA IS PRESENT.
